DE.DEFastImportantNotes:
Important Notes:
All added material in this application should be from the same Commercial Invoice/Packing List/Bill of Lading
This service allows you to apply for an increase request for the approved entitlements of the facility's input materials for industrial operations. Subsequently, you can submit a request for the customs exemption for these materials and receive the service immediately upon application, subject to the following conditions:
  • The ability to submit an increase request for the same material is limited to once per day.
  • The requested increase quantity must not exceed, in cumulative terms, 30% of the quantity of the registered material in the factory's account, and it will be added to its balance.
  • Applications for this quantity can be submitted through multiple requests within the same year.
  • For increase requests exceeding 30% of the quantity already registered in the factory's account, it is not possible to submit the increase request through this service. Please follow the traditional procedure for submitting an increase request, and after its approval, you can apply for customs exemption.

DE.DEFTServiceFeeLabel: Increase Fee 50 AED And Exemption Fee 50 AED

IL.AboutTheStrategyDetails: Conducive business environment. National industry development. Culture of innovation. Future Industries. Quality and efficiency

IL.ValueAddedNote:
Important Note:
Before requesting a Value-Added Certificate, please ensure that your License Details (Products, Raw Materials (Local and Foreign), Machinery and Equipment) is updated. Additionally, ensure you add your Utilities as a Raw Material with HS Code 27160000-Electrical energy. and Type Utility.
To update your License Details, you can do so through the Modify Industrial Production License service.
To process your application faster, please attach the following pages in the indicated attachments fields in the end of this application:
  • Profit/Loss Account Page
  • Inventory Page
  • Fixed Asset Page
  • Cost of Sales Page
  • General and Administrative Expenses Page

IL.DutyExemptionFastTrackNote:
Important Notes:
All added material in this application should be from the same Commercial Invoice/Packing List/Bill of Lading
This service allows you to apply for an increase request for the approved entitlements of the facility's input materials for industrial operations. Subsequently, you can submit a request for the customs exemption for these materials and receive the service immediately upon application, subject to the following conditions:
  • The ability to submit an increase request for the same material is limited to once per day.
  • The requested increase quantity must not exceed, in cumulative terms, 30% of the quantity of the registered material in the factory's account, and it will be added to its balance.
  • Applications for this quantity can be submitted through multiple requests within the same year.
  • For increase requests exceeding 30% of the quantity already registered in the factory's account, it is not possible to submit the increase request through this service. Please follow the traditional procedure for submitting an increase request, and after its approval, you can apply for customs exemption.
IL.FIDXPaymentSucessfulMessage: Your request and payment has been received, and you can complete the procedure with the local customs authority to clear your shipment immediately, and we also ask you to ensure that the customs officer closes the customs exemption request on the Ministry of Industry and Advanced Technology system after completing the procedures to be able to apply for additional requests.
